sub_pixel_system.notes: Based on modified Quake engine; sub-pixel precision likely inherited from Quake but not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Class-based abilities
special_mechanics.description: Four character classes (Paladin, Crusader, Assassin, Necromancer) each with unique weapons and playstyles; Demoness added in expansion

special_mechanics.name: RPG progression system
special_mechanics.description: Character statistics increase with experience, affecting HP and mana; impacts character power scaling

special_mechanics.name: Mounted weapons
special_mechanics.description: Catapults and ballistae available in multiplayer siege mode; affects movement and combat mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia general gameplay description with no specific movement physics documentation. All numerical physics parameters are absent from available sources. Game uses modified Quake engine, suggesting similar movement physics to Quake, but this is inference not documentation.
sources_used: wikipedia: Hexen II (gameplay, development, technical details)
